chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.3443 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For orders on office objection as at “A” For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 24.02.2026 Mr. Abdul Maalik, advocate for applicant Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. & Ms. Rukhsana Qassim Mirjat, ADPP PI/SHO Rizwan Qureshi IO/SIP Qaisar Abbas of PS NKIA Karachi Central Complainant present ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned counsel for applicant does not press this criminal bail application on the ground that the applicant has been acquitted of the charge by learned trial Court by way of compromise. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
